content:
3 min read
Just now

--

Ever been in a dilemma of what gift to give someone? This situation can be especially daunting if it’s meant for a close loved one and you want it to be special. Because a random gift just wouldn’t cut it and might even upset the person if they’re the type to read into it.
Most e-commerce sites fail because they suggest you items based on your past searches, order history and your data so its very less likely you would stumble across something the person its meant for would like unless you have their wishlist and gift something from that. And the best gifts are ones with an intent behind them, the ones you put time and effort in even if its something simple and cost friendly.
“It’s the thought that counts not the price.” perfectly describes what we want to achieve through our gifting website.
To remove the constant dilemma of:

• “What should I give?”

• “What are their interests?”

• “Will it look good or not?”
and much more…
Solution — We made an AI powered chatbot gifting website that understands the person and then suggests personalized gifts best suited for them that considers the relationship, aesthetic everything!
Shown above is the architecture of how our website is going to work when integrated using AWS services such as AWS CloudFront, AWS S3, AWS ECS FarGate , and many more.
After we have seen the complete architecture, it’s time we put light on the whole tech stack used in the making of the website.
Starting with Frontend

• React 18.2.0 — used for the UI [ User Interface] elements like chat conversations and gift cards.

• Plain ( Vanilla) CSS — used for visually appealing components such as buttons, gradient background, font-style, font-size, change in behaviour of elements when hovered over i.e. keyframe animations.
second comes, the backend technology

• Node.js — for building scalable network applications and helpful in handling concurrent requests.

• Express.js (Web framework for Node.js)

• API we used is OpenAI API(3.2.1)
Client-server architecture
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Here, comes the problems we focused on solving while working on our project
The “Decision paralysis in gift selection” meaning the struggle to find personalized, meaningful gifts due to :

• Information gap — not knowing what’s the recipient’s preferences

• Overwhelming options — too many options to choose from

• Lack of time — shortage of time to pick gifts
↪ KEY WORKFLOW

• User chats with AI powered chatbot

• Bot collects information (name, interests, aesthetics, occasion, budget etc.)

• Backend calls OpenAI API with structured prompts

• AI generates Personalized gift suggestions

• Beautiful UI displays suggestions with emojis and details.
<UNIQUE FEATURES>
. Conversational data collection (no forms, natural chat)
. Emotionally intelligent responses with emojis
. Glassmorphism UI with cute aesthetic
. Real-time loading states and animations
. No authentication required — immediate use
:)Moreover, our only motto for our gifting website is specially designed to make your loved ones feel more special on their special days by gifting things that will make them feel loved and seen.
